name: ExtensionConditionDefinition_Subtitle
title: R5: Subordinate title of the event definition (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConditionDefinition.subtitle` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConditionDefinition.subtitle` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ConditionDefinition.subtitle` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConditionDefinition.subtitle` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ConditionDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ConditionDefinition.subtitle` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Subordinate title of the event definition (new)
element.comment:

element.short: Subordinate title of the event definition
element.definition: An explanatory or alternate title for the event definition giving additional information about its content.
